cases.title: Device matrix row: Active session QrService returns projection-ready token DTO for instructor display
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running via Compose
Active session with QrService scheduler issuing Valid qr_tokens row
QrService.getCurrentToken wired to QrTokenRepository with TestClock within token validity window
Testing-plan §9 device matrix: instructor laptop Chrome/Edge QR projector display 1280×720 traceability NFR-20
steps: Invoke QrService.getCurrentToken(sessionId) for Active session with assigned Instructor context
Assert returned DTO contains sessionId, tokenId, qrPayload matching wecheck://check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Assert issuedAt and expiresAt are ISO 8601 UTC with expiresAt minus issuedAt equal to 30 seconds
Assert secondsRemaining is between 1 and 30 inclusive for countdown UI sync
Assert attendanceWindowClosesAt present for instructor metadata strip per API design §6.1
cases.expected: Testing-plan §9 instructor-laptop projector row satisfied at module boundary: token DTO supplies all fields required for QrCodeImage and QrCountdown projection UI per NFR-20 and FR-06

cases.title: QrCodeImage encoder uses error correction level H and minimum 4-module quiet zone for projection readability
preconditions: QrCodeImage encoding module or shared QR utility loaded in integration test harness
Sample qrPayload from Active session token: wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
Fullscreen size prop 480 px per event-specific-components §3.6
steps: Invoke QR encoder with qrPayload, size 480, and errorCorrectionLevel H
Assert generated matrix uses high error correction (H) per projection readability spec
Assert quiet zone margin is at least 4 modules on all sides
Assert output dimensions are 480×480 px for fullscreen presenter mode
Decode generated image/matrix and assert payload matches input qrPayload
cases.expected: NFR-20 module boundary: QR encoding parameters meet classroom projection scannability requirements (error correction H, quiet zone, fullscreen pixel size) per event-specific-components §3.6

cases.title: Session open to first projection token available within 1 s for instructor QR tab bootstrap
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database running
Draft session with valid room GPS configured
SessionService.open orchestrates QrService.startScheduler per state-machines SM-03
TestClock fixed at session open instant T
steps: Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) at T
Immediately invoke QrService.getCurrentToken(sessionId) within 1 second of openedAt
Assert Valid token returned with non-empty qrPayload suitable for QrCodeImage render
Assert secondsRemaining between 29 and 30 on first poll (fresh token)
Verify token exists in qr_tokens with status Valid linked to sessionId
cases.expected: Instructor QR display can bootstrap projection UI immediately on session Active transition; first scannable token available without perceptible delay per NFR-20 field-test readiness

cases.title: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current returns 200 QrTokenDisplay DTO for Active session projection
preconditions: API running on port 3001 against Compose PostgreSQL
Authenticated Instructor session cookie with qr:display permission
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken issued within last 30 seconds
steps: Send GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK and Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains sessionId, tokenId, qrPayload, issuedAt, expiresAt, secondsRemaining, attendanceWindowClosesAt
Assert qrPayload matches pattern wecheck://check-in?token=:uuid&session=:uuid
Assert secondsRemaining is integer between 1 and 30 inclusive
cases.expected: HTTP contract supplies projection-ready QR payload and countdown sync fields per API design §6.1; instructor display polls this endpoint for QrFullscreenPresentation per NFR-20

cases.title: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current returns 403 when session not Active — no projection token for Draft or Closed
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session with qr:display permission
Draft sessionId with valid GPS configured but status Draft
Closed sessionId from prior workshop
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:draftSessionId/qr/current with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 403 or 422 with no valid qrPayload in body per AC-06c
GET /api/v1/sessions/:closedSessionId/qr/current with Instructor session
Assert no valid token issued; response indicates session-not-active
Verify QrFullscreenPresentation must not render scannable QR for non-Active sessions
cases.expected: Projection endpoint withholds scannable token when session not Active; prevents misleading classroom display per ui-states §7.2 and NFR-20 honest-state requirement

cases.title: Student denied GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current — QR projection restricted to Instructor
preconditions: Active session with Valid QrToken
Authenticated Student session cookie without qr:display permission
Student enrolled in session for contrast (check-in allowed but display denied)
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert localized Vietnamese permission-denied message returned
Verify response body does not contain qrPayload or tokenId
Confirm Student cannot access instructor projection route data via API
cases.expected: RBAC prevents students from fetching projection QR token; instructor-only display per FR-06 actor and roles-permissions qr:display scope

cases.title: Instructor denied GET /qr/current for unassigned session — no cross-class projection token
preconditions: Active session for class HESD-02 assigned to Instructor B only
Authenticated Instructor A session cookie (assigned to HESD-01 only)
Session has Valid QrToken for Instructor B
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current using Instructor A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert no qrPayload or tokenId returned in response body
Verify audit or access log records denied attempt if applicable
cases.expected: Out-of-scope instructor cannot retrieve projection QR for unassigned session; protects classroom display integrity per BR-08 and NFR-20 instructor-only access

cases.title: Flow A step 3: Instructor polls qr/current and student scans projection-encoded payload successfully
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–2 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active
Instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current returns valid qrPayload
Authenticated enrolled Student with in-radius coordinates
Browser or device simulating student scan decodes qrPayload to tokenId
steps: Instructor polls GET /qr/current and capture qrPayload from response
Decode qrPayload to extract tokenId for check-in submission
Student POST /api/v1/check-in with extracted tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success and attendance Present
Verify token scannability chain: projection payload → student check-in succeeds per 5 m classroom use case
cases.expected: NFR-20 end-to-end scannability: QR payload displayed for projection is consumable by student mobile check-in per Flow A and field-test verification method

cases.title: Fullscreen /sessions/:id/qr-present at 1280×720 renders large QR on high-contrast inverse surface
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with Active session in progress
Browser viewport set to 1280×720 per testing-plan §9 device matrix and NFR-20 minimum projection spec
Instructor navigates to /sessions/:id/qr-present via Trình chiếu QR or direct route
steps: Verify FullscreenLayout renders with background --color-qr-bg (#000000) per app-layout-components §8
Verify QrCodeImage occupies at least 40% of viewport width (≥512 px at 1280) with white modules on black per ui-ux-foundation §7
Verify header strip shows session title, room name, and StatusBadge Active with --color-text-inverse
Verify Quét mã để điểm danh helper text visible below QR
Verify minimal chrome: no sidebar; Thoát toàn màn hình ghost button accessible in footer
Verify QrCountdown numeric display visible and updating each second
cases.expected: NFR-20 projector display: fullscreen presenter at 1280×720 uses high-contrast inverse QR surface with large scannable code, header metadata, and visible countdown per ui-states §13 and quality bar §2

cases.title: QrCountdown fullscreen variant uses ≥48 px bold numerals with accent and warning color tokens
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on /sessions/:id/qr-present at 1280×720 viewport
Active session with Valid token; countdown between 10 and 30 seconds remaining
Computed styles inspectable via browser devtools or Playwright evaluate
steps: Locate QrCountdown element with variant fullscreen on qr-present route
Assert computed font-size ≥ 48 px and font-weight bold per ui-ux-foundation §7 presentation mode
When secondsRemaining > 10, assert color uses --color-qr-accent (#22c55e) on --color-qr-bg (#000000) per app-layout-components §8
When secondsRemaining ≤ 10, assert accent switches to --color-qr-warning (#facc15) per design tokens §3.4
Verify countdown remains legible without zoom at 1280×720
cases.expected: NFR-20 countdown visibility: timer numerals meet minimum 48 px bold size for classroom projection distance with accent/warning token progression per ui-ux-foundation §7 and 07-non-functional-risk §2.4

cases.title: axe-core contrast audit: QrCountdown text meets 4.5:1 minimum on fullscreen presenter
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on /sessions/:id/qr-present at 1280×720
Active session with countdown visible
axe-core or equivalent accessibility engine available in Playwright test harness
steps: Run axe-core color-contrast rule scoped to QrCountdown and session metadata text on qr-present page
Assert no contrast violations for countdown numerals against --color-qr-bg when > 10 s (--color-qr-accent)
Assert contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for timer text per NFR-20 target and quality bar §4 Not acceptable negation
Repeat audit when countdown switches to --color-qr-warning at ≤ 10 s remaining
Assert warning-state countdown still meets 4.5:1 against black background
cases.expected: NFR-20 measurable target satisfied: countdown timer text contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 on projector fullscreen for both accent and warning states per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4 and production-ui-quality-bar §2

cases.title: Session detail QR tab preview meets projection minimum before fullscreen launch
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with Active session
Desktop viewport 1280×800 per wireframes instructor viewport
Instructor on /sessions/:sessionId QR tab with Active QR state
steps: Verify QrDisplayPanel renders QrCodeImage with default preview size ≥ 280 px per event-specific-components §3.6
Verify QrDisplayPanel polls GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/qr/current every 25 seconds (5 s buffer before 30 s expiry)
Verify Trình chiếu QR button visible and navigates to /sessions/:id/qr-present
Verify QrCountdown shows Mã mới sau X giây label in Vietnamese
Verify high-contrast QR presentation mode (dark background option or inverse modules) available per quality bar §3 Acceptable
Click Trình chiếu QR and verify transition to fullscreen without layout shift losing QR visibility
cases.expected: Instructor QR tab provides projection-ready preview and one-click fullscreen launch per user-flows §WF-03 and NFR-20 classroom workflow

cases.title: Field test gate: QR scannable from 5 m at 1280×720 in ≥2 pilot classrooms
preconditions: Active session running on instructor laptop connected to classroom projector at 1280×720 resolution
≥2 distinct pilot classroom environments with typical seating layout
Student test device (iOS Safari or Android Chrome) at 5 m distance from projection screen
Field test checklist template per NFR-20 verification method
steps: Classroom 1: Project /sessions/:id/qr-present fullscreen at native 1280×720 on projector
Student at 5 m scans QR with mobile camera or in-app scanner; record scan success within 30 s token window
Verify countdown timer readable by instructor at lectern without squinting
Classroom 2: Repeat projection and 5 m scan test in second room with different lighting
Record pass/fail for each classroom; both must pass for NFR-20 field verification sign-off
cases.expected: NFR-20 verification method satisfied: field test in ≥2 pilot classrooms confirms QR scannable from 5 m at 1280×720 with visible countdown per 07-non-functional-risk §2.4

cases.title: QR fullscreen state transitions: Entering → Live → Token refresh → Session ended overlay
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with Active session
Viewport 1280×720 on /sessions/:id/qr-present
Ability to close session during test or simulate session end
steps: Navigate to qr-present and verify Entering state fades to Live with large QR and countdown per ui-states §13
Wait one 30 s token refresh cycle and verify cross-fade QR image with countdown reset (Token refresh state); respects prefers-reduced-motion when set
Close session from another tab or API while fullscreen open
Verify Session ended overlay Buổi học đã kết thúc appears with semi-transparent overlay
Press Esc or Thoát toàn màn hình and verify exit returns to session detail without stale QR displayed
cases.expected: Fullscreen presenter state machine honest across token rotation and session close; projection UI does not show stale scannable QR after session ends per ui-states §13

cases.title: Viewport below 1280×720 on qr-present: QR maintains ≥280 px minimum or shows projection resolution warning
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with Active session on /sessions/:id/qr-present
Browser resizable to sub-minimum projection dimensions (e.g., 1024×576)
steps: Resize viewport to 1024×576 (below NFR-20 1280×720 minimum projection spec)
Assert QrCodeImage rendered size remains ≥ 280×280 px per wireframes §9 minimum
If layout provides resolution warning, verify Vietnamese message advises 1280×720 projector setting
Assert countdown remains visible with computed font-size ≥ 48 px or scales proportionally
Restore viewport to 1280×720 and verify fullscreen layout returns to nominal projection spec
cases.expected: NFR-20 boundary: sub-minimum viewport does not shrink QR below scannable wireframe minimum; instructor warned when projection resolution below 1280×720 target

cases.title: Low-contrast countdown styling fails quality gate — blocks merge per Not acceptable list
preconditions: Test harness can render QrCountdown with intentionally degraded contrast (e.g., #666 on #000)
axe-core color-contrast rule enabled
Simulates regression where design tokens bypassed
steps: Render qr-present with countdown text color below 4.5:1 contrast against --color-qr-bg
Run axe-core color-contrast audit on countdown element
Assert audit reports violation with contrast ratio below 4.5:1
Verify test fails CI browser gate per production-ui-quality-bar §4 Not acceptable: QR countdown below 4.5:1
Restore --color-qr-accent and --color-qr-warning tokens and re-run audit to confirm pass
cases.expected: NFR-20 contrast boundary enforced: countdown below 4.5:1 contrast detected as merge-blocking defect per quality bar §4 and NFR-20 measurable target
